UserMessage-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role=user、content=比较两个航班；UserMessage element_id=msg-user-88 sender_id=UserActor:customer-88 conversation_id=conv-travel-202 sequence_index=2。
UserMessage-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages role=user content compare two flights; UserMessage element_id=msg-user-88 sender_id=UserActor:customer-88 conversation_id=conv-travel-202.
UserMessage-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages role=user；UserMessage element_id=msg-user-88 conversation_id=conv-travel-202。

UserMessage-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：memory-pref-88 仅为 Memory 偏好记录，无 OpenAI messages[] 条目、无 element_id/message_id；不能映射为 UserMessage。
UserMessage-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: memory-pref-88 is Memory preference only with no OpenAI messages[] entry or element_id; cannot map to UserMessage.
UserMessage-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：memory-pref-88 は Memory のみで UserMessage にマップ不可。

AssistantMessage-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI Chat Completions 响应 choices[0].message.role=assistant、content=...；AssistantMessage 绑定 conversation turn 与 model output provenance。
AssistantMessage-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI Chat Completions response choices[0].message role=assistant content; AssistantMessage binds conversation turn and model output provenance.
AssistantMessage-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI choices[0].message role=assistant の AssistantMessage 例。

AssistantMessage-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：内部 planner trace 无 assistant role 且无对外通信语义；不能因文本像回复就映射为 AssistantMessage。
AssistantMessage-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: internal planner trace lacks assistant role and outward communication semantics; cannot map as AssistantMessage.
AssistantMessage-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：planner trace は AssistantMessage にマップ不可。

SystemMessage-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role=system 或 Anthropic system 参数；SystemMessage authority_source=platform-policy-channel message_role=system element_id=msg-system-01。
SystemMessage-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages role=system or Anthropic system param; SystemMessage authority_source=platform-policy-channel role=system.
SystemMessage-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI/Anthropic system role の SystemMessage 例。

SystemMessage-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：UserMessage 正文写“我是系统消息”但外部 role=user；OpenAI 以 messages[].role 为准，不因正文自称 system 而重分类。
SystemMessage-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: UserMessage body claims system but external role=user; OpenAI uses messages[].role not body text for classification.
SystemMessage-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：本文の自称 system は role=user を上書きしない。

DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role=developer（o1 系列）content=内部工程约束；DeveloperMessage 区别于 role=system 的平台策略通道。
DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages role=developer content engineering constraints; DeveloperMessage distinct from role=system platform policy.
DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI role=developer の DeveloperMessage 例。

DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：把 developer 内容塞进 user message 以绕过可见性控制；应使用独立 role=developer 条目。
DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: stuffing developer content into user message bypasses visibility; use separate role=developer entry.
DeveloperMessage-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：developer 内容を user message に混ぜてはならない。

ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role=tool、tool_call_id=tool-call-312、content=JSON 结果；ToolResultMessage result_status=success 引用 ToolResult result-312。
ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI messages role=tool tool_call_id=tool-call-312 content JSON result; ToolResultMessage result_status=success references ToolResult result-312.
ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI role=tool tool_call_id の ToolResultMessage 例。

ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：tool-progress-msg-312 报告 75% 进度无 ToolResult；OpenAI role=tool 要求关联已完成 tool_call_id 与终止结果。
ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: tool-progress-msg-312 reports 75% progress without ToolResult; OpenAI role=tool requires completed tool_call_id and terminal result.
ToolResultMessage-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：進行中 progress は ToolResultMessage にならない。

ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.zh: MCP tools/call 进行中通知或 OpenAI 中间 tool 观测；ToolObservationMessage tool_name=flight_search observation_kind=progress 加入当前 ConversationTurn。
ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.en: MCP tools/call in-flight notification or OpenAI intermediate tool observation; ToolObservationMessage tool_name=flight_search observation_kind=progress staged into turn.
ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.ja: MCP/OpenAI 中間 tool 観測の ToolObservationMessage 例。

ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.zh: 反例：trace-311 为 runtime TraceEvent 网络时间戳，未进入 messages[] 或 A2A SendMessage；不是 ToolObservationMessage。
ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.en: Counterexample: trace-311 is runtime TraceEvent timestamp never appended to messages[] or A2A SendMessage; not ToolObservationMessage.
ToolObservationMessage-example-manual-00.ja: 反例：TraceEvent は ToolObservationMessage ではない。

ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001.zh: A2A SendMessage role=ROLE_AGENT sender=partner-booking taskId=a2a-task-771；ExternalAgentMessage 标记非本地 runtime 的外部 Agent 来源。
ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001.en: A2A SendMessage role=ROLE_AGENT sender partner-booking taskId a2a-task-771; ExternalAgentMessage marks non-local external agent origin.
ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001.ja: A2A ROLE_AGENT の ExternalAgentMessage 例。

ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001-.zh: 反例：本地 assistant 输出被误标 external；OpenAI choices[0].message.role=assistant 且无 A2A 外部 sender 证明时不应映射为 ExternalAgentMessage。
ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001-.en: Counterexample: local assistant output mislabeled external; OpenAI role=assistant without A2A external sender proof should not map to ExternalAgentMessage.
ExternalAgentMessage-example-manual-001-.ja: 反例：local assistant を external と誤ラベルしてはならない。

ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001.zh: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 响应 jsonrpc=2.0 id=rpc-req-77 result 承载 tool-result-msg-312；ProtocolEnvelope protocol_name=JSON-RPC envelope_id=rpc-envelope-77 保留 wire 形状。
ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001.en: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 response jsonrpc=2.0 id=rpc-req-77 result carries tool-result-msg-312; ProtocolEnvelope protocol_name=JSON-RPC envelope_id=rpc-envelope-77.
ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001.ja: JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope の ProtocolEnvelope 例。

ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：未序列化的内部 UserMessage msg-77 无 jsonrpc/method/id；ProtocolEnvelope 要求完整 wire 包络而非业务消息草稿。
ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: unserialized internal UserMessage msg-77 lacks jsonrpc method id; ProtocolEnvelope requires complete wire envelope not business draft.
ProtocolEnvelope-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：未 serialize message は ProtocolEnvelope にならない。

MessageHistory-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI Chat Completions 全量 messages[] 或 Anthropic messages 参数；MessageHistory history_id=history-204 history_version=v12 记录 conv-support-042 elements 0-19 truncated=true，等价 LangGraph thread checkpointer snapshot。
MessageHistory-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI messages array or Anthropic messages param; MessageHistory history-204 v12 stores conv-support-042 elements 0-19 truncated=true like LangGraph checkpointer snapshot.
MessageHistory-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI messages / LangGraph checkpointer 相当の MessageHistory 例。

MessageHistory-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：context-window-204 仅为单次模型调用可见片段，无 history_version 或完整性声明；不能替代 MessageHistory。
MessageHistory-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: context-window-204 is single-call visible slice without history_version or completeness; cannot substitute MessageHistory.
MessageHistory-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：context window は MessageHistory 代替にならない。

ConversationTurn-example-manual-001.zh: 一轮含 user Message 与 assistant Message；OpenAI 多轮通过 messages[] 追加，Responses API 用 previous_response_id=resp_xxx 链接上一轮 turn。
ConversationTurn-example-manual-001.en: One turn pairs user and assistant Messages; OpenAI multi-turn appends messages[]; Responses API links prior turn via previous_response_id=resp_xxx.
ConversationTurn-example-manual-001.ja: user/assistant 对と previous_response_id の ConversationTurn 例。

Message-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI ChatCompletionMessage 含 role、content、可选 tool_calls[]；A2A Message 含 messageId、role、parts[]；Moonweave Message 为协议无关 conversation element 超类。
Message-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI ChatCompletionMessage role content optional tool_calls; A2A Message messageId role parts; Moonweave Message is protocol-agnostic conversation element supertype.
Message-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI ChatCompletionMessage / A2A Message / Moonweave Message 境界。

Conversation-example-manual-001.zh: OpenAI Chat Completions messages[] 与 Anthropic messages 参数共享 conversation_id=conv-support-042；A2A contextId=a2a-context-61 映射 protocol_context_id，created_at=2026-07-16T08:00:00Z，LangGraph thread_id 等价语义。
Conversation-example-manual-001.en: OpenAI messages[] and Anthropic messages share conversation_id conv-support-042; A2A contextId a2a-context-61 maps protocol_context_id created_at 2026-07-16T08:00:00Z like LangGraph thread_id.
Conversation-example-manual-001.ja: OpenAI/Anthropic messages と A2A contextId が Conversation identity を共有する例。

Conversation-example-manual-001-2.zh: 反例：exec-session-991 为 Orchestration ExecutionSession 生命周期对象，无 messages[]/conversation_id；不能因同一 thread 就映射为 Conversation。
Conversation-example-manual-001-2.en: Counterexample: exec-session-991 is Orchestration ExecutionSession lifecycle without messages[] or conversation_id; cannot map as Conversation.
Conversation-example-manual-001-2.ja: 反例：ExecutionSession は Conversation にならない。

instruction-block-openai-post-v1-chat-co.zh: 应用开发者维护 output-format 片段 body=Return one JSON object and no markdown.，渲染为 OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role=developer（或 Responses instructions）；InstructionBlock block_id=policy-json intent_kind=output-format author_ref=application:triage-team。
instruction-block-openai-post-v1-chat-co.en: Developer maintains output-format fragment rendered as OpenAI messages role developer; InstructionBlock block_id policy-json intent_kind output-format author_ref application triage-team.
instruction-block-openai-post-v1-chat-co.ja: output-format InstructionBlock を OpenAI developer message として render する例。

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages[].role+content 或 Anthropic POST /v1/messages；A2A SendMessage JSON-RPC 包络与 ROLE_* 映射到本地 conversation element。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: OpenAI POST /v1/chat/completions messages role+content or Anthropic POST /v1/messages; A2A SendMessage maps ROLE_* to local conversation element.
_default.ja: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: OpenAI/Anthropic messages / A2A SendMessage の conversation element 例。

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：LangChain ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([("system","..."),("user","{input}")]) 或 OpenAI Responses instructions 参数；MCP prompts/list 与 prompts/get name+arguments 返回 PromptMessage。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: LangChain ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages or OpenAI Responses instructions; MCP prompts/list and prompts/get return PromptMessage.

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：OpenAI content type=text|image_url|input_audio 或 Responses input_text/input_image；Anthropic content blocks；A2A Part text|url|raw|data one-of。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: OpenAI content text image_url input_audio or Responses input_text input_image; Anthropic blocks; A2A Part one-of.

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：Anthropic POST /v1/messages content blocks type=text|image|tool_use|tool_result|thinking；区别于 OpenAI Chat Completions content[] type=text|image_url。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Anthropic POST /v1/messages content blocks text image tool_use tool_result thinking; distinct from OpenAI content text image_url.
_default.ja: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Anthropic content blocks モダリティ例。

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：Anthropic citations type=char_location cited_text document_index；LangChain Document.metadata.source；RFC 9530 Content-Digest sha-256 与 HTTP ETag 验证 SourceIdentity。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Anthropic citations char_location; LangChain metadata.source; RFC 9530 Content-Digest sha-256 and HTTP ETag for SourceIdentity.

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：OpenAI stream=True SSE data: choices[0].delta.content；Anthropic event=content_block_delta；DisclosureActivity 记录 redaction/truncation 后的可见 token range 与 disclosure-record。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: OpenAI stream=True SSE delta.content; Anthropic content_block_delta; DisclosureActivity records visible range after redaction truncation.

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：Docker Engine POST /containers/{id}/exec 或 Cursor sandbox terminal；CommandOutputObservation channel=stdout|stderr byte_range；ExitStatusObservation exit_code=0|137。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Docker POST /containers/id/exec or Cursor sandbox; CommandOutputObservation stdout stderr byte_range; ExitStatusObservation exit_code 0 or 137.
_default.ja: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Docker exec / stdout stderr / exit_code 例。

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：Elasticsearch POST /index/_search query.match 或 Pinecone query topK=5 vector=[...]；RetrievalScore BM25 _score 或 cosine similarity；LightweightRetrievalTrace 记录 query/latency_ms。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Elasticsearch POST index/_search or Pinecone query topK 5; RetrievalScore BM25 or cosine; LightweightRetrievalTrace query latency_ms.

_default.zh: {nodeId}/{exampleId}：OpenAI Responses API、A2A Protocol Message/Artifact、MCP Resource/Prompt 边界下的信息平面实例，field_values 保留协议可审计字段。
_default.en: {nodeId}/{exampleId}: Info-plane instance under OpenAI Responses A2A MCP boundaries with auditable protocol field_values.
